CustomField.formula:
IF( AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Parent_Name__c)), OR( ISPICKVAL(Practice_Area__c, "Real Estate Development (Property File)"), ISPICKVAL(Practice_Area__c, "Intellectual Property (Property file)"), ISPICKVAL(Practice_Area__c, "Litigation (Property File)"), ISPICKVAL(Practice_Area__c, "General File") ) ), Client_Initial__c & "/" & Department_Initial__c & Client__r.Type_Client_Initial__c & TEXT(Parent_Name__r.Physical_File_Number__c) & Priority_Initial__c & Location_Initial__c & "/" & TEXT(Client__r.Client_Number__c),
IF( ISPICKVAL(Department__c, "Secretarial"), Client_Initial__c & "/" & Department_Initial__c & Client__r.Type_Client_Initial__c & TEXT(Physical_File_Number__c) & Priority_Initial__c & Location_Initial__c & "/" & Client__r.HISA_Client_Number__c,
Client_Initial__c & "/" & Department_Initial__c & Client__r.Type_Client_Initial__c & TEXT(Physical_File_Number__c) & Priority_Initial__c & Location_Initial__c & "/" & TEXT(Client__r.Client_Number__c) ) )
CustomField.label: File Number
